rulings.Case Title: RICHARD L MILLER VS. BERNARD N WOLF et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 27, 2008 LINE 7. DEFENDANT BERNARD WOLF's DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Both causes of action are for legal malpractice and are governed by CCP section 340.6. Plaintiff's suit was filed on March 27, 2007 and plaintiff's injury occurred in June of 2004. Absent tolling, the claim is barred. Section 340.6 may be tolled only as delineated in the statute itself. In the Second Amended Complaint, plaintiff alleged that after the malpractice occurred that plaintiff "retained Madow to handle the briefings in said appeal." The record reflects that is so and that defendant had an unspecified but a reduced role thereafter. As a consequence, it appears that the statute of limitations may not have been tolled by the continuing representation rule. Foxborough v. Van Atta (1994) 26 Cal.App.4th 217. However, the Court need not reach that point. It is undisputed that plaintiff replaced defendant as counsel on March 20, 2006 and that this complaint was not filed until March 27, 2007. Plaintiff's reliance on CCP section 351, as alleged in paragraph 5 of the Third Amended Complaint, is without merit given the express language of CCP section 340.6 and the holding in Laird v. Blacker (1992) 2 Cal.4th 606, 618. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: JESSE HENRY et al VS. OMI MAMBER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Stay Or Dismis Action
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 27, 2008 LINE 16. DEFENDANTS ORI MAMBER AND AMERI-CURE (USA), INC.'S Motion To Stay Or Dismiss Action IS GRANTED AND THE ACTION IS DISMISSED. THE FORUM SELECTION CLAUSE IS MANDATORY AND PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE THAT IT IS UNREASONABLE. AS A CONSEQUENCE, IT MUST BE ENFORCED AND IS NOT SUBJECT TO A FORUM NON CONVENIENS ANALYSIS. INTERSHOP COMMUNICATION, A G V SUPERIOR COURT (2002) 104 CAL APP 4TH 191, 196-197. =(302/PJM/AY)
